The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed primarily focus on acute and chronic conditions unrelated to lipid metabolism. Additionally, while the patient may have cardiovascular risk factors, there is no mention of ongoing management or diagnosis of a lipid disorder. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is not reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
